TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-map_buya
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.TRANSL: Buay came out from his house.

TRANSL.notes: (he) came out and then turned left.

S.TRANSL: came out and then turned left.

S.FORM: mlazyuti tu sazan s% tu sazan 'nay.
S.PHON: mraz~rjuti tu saz~ran s% tu saz~ran ʔnaj.
S.FORM: mlazyuti tu sazan s% tu sazan 'nay.
S.PHON: mraz~rjuti tu saz~ran s% tu saz~ran ʔnaj.

TRANSL.notes: then (he walked) towards the mountain and climbed.

S.TRANSL: then towards the mountain and climbed.
then he saw…he saw that pig…

S.FORM: n usiq babuy ta babuy na naung.
S.PHON: n usiq βaβuj ta βaβuj na nauŋ.
S.FORM: n usiq babuy ta babuy na naung.
S.PHON: n usiq βaβuj ta βaβuj na nauŋ.

S.FORM: nani mlazyu uman wi smaRuRti ya.
S.PHON: nani mraz~rju uman wi smaʁuʁti ja.
S.FORM: nani mlazyu uman wi smaRuRti ya.
S.PHON: nani mraz~rju uman wi smaʁuʁti ja.

TRANSL.notes: 他又經過了(山豬)後,再走下去.

S.TRANSL: 他又經過了 後,再走下去.

TRANSL.notes: (He) passed (the boar) again and then went down (the mountain).

S.TRANSL: passed again and then went down .
and arrived at the big place…road.

S.FORM: nani takawilian zana lepaw ni utay.
S.PHON: nani takawirian z~rana rəpaw ni utaj.
S.FORM: nani takawilian zana lepaw ni utay.
S.PHON: nani takawirian z~rana rəpaw ni utaj.

TRANSL.notes: Utay's home was on the left (of the road).

S.TRANSL: Utay's home was on the left .

S.FORM: tmeqez talepawan ni utay tu salukian.
S.PHON: tməqəz~r tarəpawan ni utaj tu sarukian.
S.FORM: tmeqez talepawan ni utay tu salukian.
S.PHON: tməqəz~r tarəpawan ni utaj tu sarukian.

TRANSL.notes: (He) stopped over at Utay's house for one hour.

S.TRANSL: stopped over at Utay's house for one hour.

S.PHON: nani punti tautajan man z~ra ʔnaja.
nani punti tautajan man z~ra ʔnaja.

S.FORM: punti nani zukatti wiyati uman seme% smaqay.
S.PHON: punti nani z~rukatti wijati uman səmə% smaqaj.
S.FORM: punti nani zukatti wiyati uman seme% smaqay.
S.PHON: punti nani z~rukatti wijati uman səmə% smaqaj.

TRANSL.notes: (he) went out and then walking again

S.TRANSL: went out and then walking again

S.FORM: wi smaqay nani titaanna pasa kawanan yau usiq kitut ay lazan.
S.PHON: wi smaqaj nani titaanna pasa kawanan jau usiq kitut aj raz~ran.
S.FORM: wi smaqay nani titaanna pasa kawanan yau usiq kitut ay lazan.
S.PHON: wi smaqaj nani titaanna pasa kawanan jau usiq kitut aj raz~ran.
S.TRANSL: 他看到右邊有一條小路;
He saw on the right there was one road that was small;

TRANSL.notes: 之後他就往那個(小路的方向)走.

S.TRANSL: 之後他就往那個 走.

S.FORM: kawa kawanan na lazan 'nay yau usiq 'nay iki.
S.PHON: kawa kawanan na raz~ran ʔnaj jau usiq ʔnaj iki.
S.FORM: kawa kawanan na lazan 'nay yau usiq 'nay iki.
S.PHON: kawa kawanan na raz~ran ʔnaj jau usiq ʔnaj iki.
S.TRANSL: There was one pond on the right of the road.

S.FORM: qatuRiyas uman ci buya smaqay tu lazanna.
S.PHON: qatuʁijas uman ʦi βuja smaqaj tu raz~ranna.
S.FORM: qatuRiyas uman ci buya smaqay tu lazanna.
S.PHON: qatuʁijas uman ʦi βuja smaqaj tu raz~ranna.

TRANSL.notes: Buya again walked (along) his way very fast.

S.TRANSL: Buya again walked his way very fast.

S.FORM: ah nani mlazyu uman tu sazan.
S.PHON: ah nani mraz~rju uman tu saz~ran.
S.FORM: ah nani mlazyu uman tu sazan.
S.PHON: ah nani mraz~rju uman tu saz~ran.

S.TRANSL: and then went to the front.

S.FORM: yauti 'nay Raya ay tabay ay zena tayan nani.
S.PHON: jauti ʔnaj ʁaja aj taβaj aj z~rəna tajan nani.
S.FORM: yauti 'nay Raya ay tabay ay zena tayan nani.
S.PHON: jauti ʔnaj ʁaja aj taβaj aj z~rəna tajan nani.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有一塊又大又寬的水田.
There was a paddy field that was big and wide over there.

TRANSL.notes: (He) went along the middle of the paddy field.

S.TRANSL: went along the middle of the paddy field.

S.FORM: maseq ta zen ta zen ta.
S.PHON: masəq ta z~rən ta z~rən ta.
S.FORM: maseq ta zen ta zen ta.
S.PHON: masəq ta z~rən ta z~rən ta.
mraz~rju tu ʁajaaj ʔnaj raz~ran nani.
mraz~rju tu ʁajaaj ʔnaj raz~ran nani.
S.TRANSL: and crossed the road that was big.

S.FORM: mlazyu lazan 'nay yau muaza paRin tayan nani.
S.PHON: mraz~rju raz~ran ʔnaj jau muaz~ra paʁin tajan nani.
S.FORM: mlazyu lazan 'nay yau muaza paRin tayan nani.
S.PHON: mraz~rju raz~ran ʔnaj jau muaz~ra paʁin tajan nani.
S.TRANSL: 過了大馬路,那裡有很多樹.

TRANSL.notes: (He) crossed that road and there were a lot of trees there.

S.TRANSL: crossed that road and there were a lot of trees there.
